playground.title: DemoKit
playground.description: Capture and play back any web page as a demo. Bookmarklet for authenticated pages, URL fetch for public ones.

playground.title: Stem Studio
playground.description: Upload any song. AI splits it into vocals, drums, bass, and other stems. Effects, pitch shift, time stretch, sample maker, mix export.

playground.title: Zen Garden
playground.description: Ink and Void: a CSS Zen Garden submission. 1800 lines of pure CSS, scroll-driven animations, oklch color, @property, subgrid. Zero images, zero JS.
